expectations.evidence: Skill explicitly requires confirmation before mutating calls. Expected output: 'Assign Balen as child of Arendonk (contains relation). Proceed?'
Skill states: 'Do NOT execute the call until the user approves.' Not actually executed to avoid mutating DEV data.
Expected call uses correct UUIDs: asset_uuid=601b1bb8 (Balen), parent_asset_uuid=7de54b47 (Arendonk), relation_type='contains', deleted=false. Verified against batch_update_asset_assignments schema.

issues_found: The skill says 'Fetch the tree first to see current structure' before managing relations. But get_assets_tree is broken on remote MCP. The skill needs a fallback: e.g., use get_contracts filter_options.assets to discover assets, or use get_asset to look up individual assets by UUID.
Same asset-name-to-UUID resolution problem as other evals.
note: Dry run only — batch_update_asset_assignments not actually called to avoid mutating DEV data
